Electronic Press Kit
Producer · DJ · Atlanta, GA
UK Garage Speed House Euro Dance Speed Garage
About

Buballoo is an Atlanta-based producer and DJ forging a distinct sonic identity at the intersection of UK underground culture and European club music. Rooted in the rhythmic pulse of UK Garage and Speed Garage, and elevated by the kinetic energy of Speed House and Euro Dance, the sound is a transatlantic love letter — raw, melodic, and built for the floor.

As a producer, Buballoo has earned the ears of internationally respected artists — crafting remixes and original edits that have been downloaded and actively played by names including Wuki and Fallon. Their production sits at the crossroads of underground UK sounds and euphoric European club music, resulting in tracks that feel simultaneously fresh and deeply rooted in tradition.

On the performance side, Buballoo has built a growing résumé of over 30 shows across Athens and Atlanta, sharing stages with acclaimed electronic acts and bringing a sound that audiences in the American South simply haven't experienced before.

Production
Sound & Style
Remixes, Edits & Originals
Buballoo's production is built around the sounds that define the UK and European underground — two-step rhythms, chopped vocal chops, driving basslines, and euphoric melodic lifts. Working across speed house, UK garage, and euro dance, each track is engineered with the dance floor in mind: functional, dynamic, and emotionally charged. From free-download edits to unreleased exclusives passed between DJs, the catalogue reflects a producer deeply fluent in the genre.
Industry Recognition
Downloaded & Played Worldwide
Buballoo's remix work has reached beyond the Southeast and landed in the record bags of internationally recognized DJs. Tracks have been downloaded and played by artists with global followings — a rare achievement for an independent producer still early in their career. Each co-sign represents not just a download, but a vote of confidence from artists who field hundreds of demos and promos every month.
Wuki
Downloaded & played in sets — Where Have You Been (Remix) · Where You Are (Remix)
Fallon
Downloaded — Diet Coke x Tesla (Remix)
Joe Hunt
Downloaded — Neck (Buballoo x Akhil Remix — Unreleased)
The DJ Set
Bringing the warehouse to the South.

In a regional market largely defined by tech house, Afro house, and mainstream EDM, Buballoo carves out something entirely different. Drawing deep from the roots of UK and European underground culture, every set is a deliberate attempt to transplant the raw, communal energy of a London or Berlin warehouse into the clubs and venues of Athens and Atlanta.

That warehouse atmosphere — the relentless forward momentum, the sense that the room is moving as one — is the driving force behind every performance. Buballoo weaves together high-energy speed house and euro dance with the stuttering two-step rhythms of speed garage and UK garage, building sets that rise and breathe like the floors that inspired them. It's euphoric, it's physical, and it's unlike anything else playing in the South right now.
